name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 7 Oct 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" In this release, we are implementing some new options for the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/paypal-payment-method","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"PayPal Payment Method"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Read on for more information!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Feature","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"PayPal Checkout","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalLogo.0685g000009vX6YAAU.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalLogo.0685g000009vX6YAAU.png","name":"PayPal_Logo","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":141,"width":218}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This new method can be used by customers to pay for an order from their My Account page on the webstore. Eligible customers will find this option available under the "},{"text":"Select your payment method","bold":true},{"text":" dropdown on the "},{"text":"Pay Now","bold":true},{"text":" page."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This new method can be used by merchants to pay for an order from the control panel including on the Receipt Payments page."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to set up multiple instances of the payment method, allowing for differing Configuration options based on user group, min/max spend, etc."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to Set the colour of the PayPal Checkout button that appears on the Maropost Checkout. Choose from Gold, Blue, Black, White or Silver."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to choose whether to display a separate PayPal “Pay in 4” button on the checkout (Note: this dependant on Pay in 4 being enabled on your PayPal account)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to set your own display name, which will be used on the checkout."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Successful setup of this method will automatically disable any existing PayPal Express or PayPal Standard payment methods you have active, meaning you don’t have to do this manually."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"PayPal Advanced Credit and Debit Cards","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalACaDC.0685g000009vX6iAAE.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/PayPalACaDC.0685g000009vX6iAAE.png","name":"PayPal_ACaDC","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":140,"width":216}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This new method can be used by customers to pay for an order from their "},{"text":"My Account","bold":true},{"text":" page on the webstore. Eligible customers will find this option available under the "},{"text":"Select your payment method","bold":true},{"text":" dropdown on the "},{"text":"Pay Now","bold":true},{"text":" page."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This new method can be used by merchants to pay for an order from the control panel including on the Receipt Payments page. "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to set up multiple instances of the payment method, allowing for differing Configuration options based on user group, min/max spend, etc."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Ability to set your own display name, which will be used on the checkout."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Venmo via PayPal (US Stores Only)","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Venmo through PayPal will be available for merchants with US-based stores."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
